## Security Notes

- [ ] No secrets or credentials are included.
- [ ] Local-development defaults are not presented as production-safe.
- [ ] New auth behavior includes tests for failure cases.
- [ ] Dependency or CI changes keep the workflow free of secrets and external service credentials.

## Commercial Links

- [ ] If commercial links are added later, they include nearby disclosure and decision context.
